name: Rubric grid
when_to_use: 需要把评分标准按“评价维度 × 表现等级”完整讲清，并标出某份作业在各维度所处等级时用它，适合教学量规、面试评分、设计评审和交付验收；若只比较方案是否具备功能，用 comparison-table，若只展示总分则用进度或 KPI 组件。
why_valuable: 普通 Markdown 量规在描述较长时难以保持行列对应，也很难突出已选等级；本模板提供粘性表头/首列、权重标签、逐格描述与每行独立 Selected 高亮，能把“标准是什么”和“当前落点”放在同一个矩阵里。

data_in.note: data 是 criteria-major 量规矩阵：levels 定义列，criteria 定义行；每个 criterion.descriptors 按 levels 顺序一一对应，长度不足的格显示 —。criterion.selectedLevel 与 level.id 字符串化后相等时高亮该格；未设置则该行不高亮。weight 和 level.score 都是展示文本，不参与计算。

schema.title?: string —— 量规标题；省略时显示 “Assessment rubric”
schema.subtitle?: string —— 适用任务、年级或评审轮次的短说明
schema.levels: {id:string|number,label:string,score?:string|number}[] —— 从低到高或从高到低的表现等级列；id 用于 selectedLevel 匹配，score 为可选分值/区间标签
schema.criteria: {label:string,weight?:string|number,descriptors:string[],selectedLevel?:string|number}[] —— 评价维度行；descriptors[index] 对应 levels[index]，selectedLevel 高亮当前等级

spec.note: 按内容增高，表体最高 660px 后内部滚动；最小表宽 760px，窄屏横向滚动并保持表头与首列粘住。无 vh/百分比高度。

en.when_to_use: Use it to explain an assessment rubric completely across "criterion x performance level" and mark where a submission falls for each criterion. It suits teaching rubrics, interview scoring, design reviews, and delivery acceptance. If you only need to compare whether options have features, use comparison-table; if you only need a total score, use a progress or KPI component.
en.why_valuable: A Markdown rubric with long descriptions struggles to preserve row/column correspondence and highlight selected levels. This template supplies sticky headers/first column, weight labels, per-cell descriptions, and independent Selected highlighting per row, keeping both the standard and the current result in one matrix.

data_in.note: data is a criteria-major rubric matrix: levels defines columns and criteria defines rows. Each criterion.descriptors corresponds positionally to levels; cells beyond the descriptor length show an em dash. A cell is highlighted when stringified criterion.selectedLevel equals level.id; when unset, the row is not highlighted. weight and level.score are display text only and are not calculated.

schema.title?: string -- rubric title; displays "Assessment rubric" when omitted
schema.subtitle?: string -- short note describing the task, grade, or review round
schema.levels: {id:string|number,label:string,score?:string|number}[] -- performance-level columns ordered low-to-high or high-to-low; id matches selectedLevel and score is an optional score/range label
schema.criteria: {label:string,weight?:string|number,descriptors:string[],selectedLevel?:string|number}[] -- criterion rows; descriptors[index] maps to levels[index], and selectedLevel highlights the current level

spec.note: Height grows with content; after 660px, the table body scrolls internally. Minimum table width is 760px; narrow screens scroll horizontally while keeping the header and first column sticky. No vh or percentage heights.

example._why: 三项写作标准、四个等级和每行不同的已选等级形成完整矩阵，可验证长描述、权重、分数标签与 Selected 高亮。

criteria.label: Evidence & sourcing
descriptors: Claims are mostly unsupported or sources are not traceable.
Uses relevant sources, but evidence is uneven or weakly connected.
Supports each major claim with credible, clearly cited evidence.
Synthesizes authoritative sources and explains limits or conflicts.

criteria.label: Analysis
descriptors: Repeats source material without a clear analytical thread.
Offers a position, though reasoning contains gaps or assumptions.
Builds a coherent argument and considers a meaningful counterpoint.
Produces an original, nuanced conclusion from multiple perspectives.

criteria.label: Clarity & structure
descriptors: Organization obscures the main point and key terms are undefined.
Basic structure is visible, with some repetition or abrupt transitions.
Uses concise sections, clear transitions, and precise terminology.
Guides the reader effortlessly with polished, economical prose.

uplink: 纯 display 组件，无 uplink；所有状态均由 data 决定，不向 AI 或宿主回传选择。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
